---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for improvement
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Clear and concise description of the desired feature.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Describe the desired behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Implementation Approach

Do you have a suggested implementation approach?

## Impact

- **Affected Components**: [e.g., Backend, Frontend, Database]
- **Breaking Changes**: Yes/No
- **Backwards Compatible**: Yes/No

## Additional Context

Any diagrams, examples, or additional information?
